'''?ch?''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:heart|heart]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-ch-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heart|heart]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æchi?ith|?æchi?ith]] || [[word:?æchi?ij|?æchi?ij]] || [[word:?æchi?ish|?æchi?ish]] || [[word:?æchi?i|?æchi?i]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:?achuchu?uth|?achuchu?uth]] || [[word:?achuchu?uj|?achuchu?uj]] || [[word:?achuchu?ush|?achuchu?ush]] || [[word:?achuchu?u|?achuchu?u]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:?achu?uth|?achu?uth]] || [[word:?achu?uj|?achu?uj]] || [[word:?achu?ush|?achu?ush]] || [[word:?achu?u|?achu?u]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:?achuf?uth|?achuf?uth]] || [[word:?achuf?uj|?achuf?uj]] || [[word:?achuf?ush|?achuf?ush]] || [[word:?achuf?uf|?achuf?uf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æche?eth|?æche?eth]] || [[word:?æche?ej|?æche?ej]] || [[word:?æche?esh|?æche?esh]] || [[word:?æche?e|?æche?e]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:?achocho?oth|?achocho?oth]] || [[word:?achocho?oj|?achocho?oj]] || [[word:?achocho?osh|?achocho?osh]] || [[word:?achocho?o|?achocho?o]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:?acho?oth|?acho?oth]] || [[word:?acho?oj|?acho?oj]] || [[word:?acho?osh|?acho?osh]] || [[word:?acho?o|?acho?o]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:?achof?oth|?achof?oth]] || [[word:?achof?oj|?achof?oj]] || [[word:?achof?osh|?achof?osh]] || [[word:?achof?of|?achof?of]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:?achïf?ïfth|?achïf?ïfth]] || [[word:?achïf?ïfj|?achïf?ïfj]] || [[word:?achïf?ïfsh|?achïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:?achïf?ïf|?achïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:?achïfchïf?ïfth|?achïfchïf?ïfth]] || [[word:?achïfchïf?ïfj|?achïfchïf?ïfj]] || [[word:?achïfchïf?ïfsh|?achïfchïf?ïfsh]] || [[word:?achïfchïf?ïf|?achïfchïf?ïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:?æchæ?æth|?æchæ?æth]] || [[word:?æchæ?æj|?æchæ?æj]] || [[word:?æchæ?æsh|?æchæ?æsh]] || [[word:?æchæ?æ|?æchæ?æ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:?achacha?ath|?achacha?ath]] || [[word:?achacha?aj|?achacha?aj]] || [[word:?achacha?ash|?achacha?ash]] || [[word:?achacha?a|?achacha?a]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:?acha?ath|?acha?ath]] || [[word:?acha?aj|?acha?aj]] || [[word:?acha?ash|?acha?ash]] || [[word:?acha?a|?acha?a]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:?achaf?ath|?achaf?ath]] || [[word:?achaf?aj|?achaf?aj]] || [[word:?achaf?ash|?achaf?ash]] || [[word:?achaf?af|?achaf?af]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:?acha?atha|?acha?atha]] || [[word:?acha?aja|?acha?aja]] || [[word:?acha?asha|?acha?asha]] || [[word:?acha?aka|?acha?aka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:?acha?ath|?acha?ath]] || [[word:?acha?aj|?acha?aj]] || [[word:?acha?ash|?acha?ash]] || [[word:?acha?a|?acha?a]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:?acha?athal|?acha?athal]] || [[word:?acha?ajal|?acha?ajal]] || [[word:?acha?ashal|?acha?ashal]] || [[word:?acha?akal|?acha?akal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:?acha?athatha|?acha?athatha]] || [[word:?acha?ajaja|?acha?ajaja]] || [[word:?acha?ashasha|?acha?ashasha]] || [[word:?acha?aka|?acha?aka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:?acha?athan|?acha?athan]] || [[word:?acha?ajan|?acha?ajan]] || [[word:?acha?ashan|?acha?ashan]] || [[word:?acha?akan|?acha?akan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:?acha?athaoro|?acha?athaoro]] || [[word:?acha?ajaoro|?acha?ajaoro]] || [[word:?acha?ashaoro|?acha?ashaoro]] || [[word:?acha?akaoro|?acha?akaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
